text.title: Creating or Updating Claude Code Skills Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "name": "code-review", "description": "Reviews a diff against project conventions; surfaces blocking + non-blocking findings.", "allowed_tools": [ "Read", "Grep", "Glob", "Bash" ], "trigger_keywords": [ "review this", "code review", "lint my diff" ], "scope": "global-faion-network", "body_lines": 142, "keyword_test_passed": true }

example.note: Name camelCase; allowed_tools empty; missing description, trigger_keywords, scope.
